title: Pretext Construction Challenge
description: Create a believable pretext script using provided OSINT data.
problemStatement:
# Scenario: The Help Desk Call

You are targeting **Amanda Chen**, a Project Manager at **Initech**.

**OSINT Dossier:**
- **LinkedIn:** Amanda started at Initech **2 weeks ago**. Previous job: 5 years at Globex.
- **Twitter:** Tweet 3 days ago: *"Ugh, why is **Salesforce** always so slow on VPN? #WFH"*
- **Company News:** Initech just announced a partnership with **Microsoft Azure**.

**Goal:** Get Amanda to read you her 6-digit Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) code.

**Task:** Write a 100-150 word phone script. 
Include:
- A plausible identity.
- A reference to the OSINT (Salesforce, Azure, or New Hire status).
- A clear, simple objective request.
- A smooth exit.

**Constraints:** Do NOT use fear or threats. Use helpfulness/competence.
hints: Hint 1: New hires are perfect targets. They don't know the IT staff names.
Hint 2: Mentioning 'Salesforce' or 'Azure migration' makes you sound like an insider.
expectedOutput: Caller: Hi, is this Amanda? This is Leo from the IT Help Desk. Sorry to bug you—I know you're new and probably drowning in onboarding stuff. We're doing a quick audit of the Salesforce VPN connector since the Azure migration. A couple of new hires like yourself have had their tokens de-sync. Could you pop open your authenticator and read me the current code just so I can verify you're on the right backend pool? It'll save you a lockout later today. ... Great, that's perfect. You're all set. Welcome to Initech!
solutionCode: Hi Amanda, it's Dave from Initech IT Support. I'm reaching out because we had a glitch with the Salesforce integration for new hires during the Azure cutover. A few people got locked out of VPN last week and I'm trying to proactively fix it. I just need to verify the current MFA code on your phone is syncing correctly. Can you read me the 6 digits real quick? It'll take two seconds and then you won't have to deal with a lockout ticket later. Thanks!
